creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #10)
> Could you please confirm that the use of `USE_GCC` is correct and
> that it won't break any future work on GCC ports?

This looks good to me, thank you!

(It's preferable not to refer to specific versions of GCC, yet given
circumstances I don't have a better suggestion.)
